zh.Old Burying Ground, Cambridge, Middlesex: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可坎布利其
zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Cutter於1621年8月21日出生在英國諾圖波藍德紐可亞斯特爾 武朋時，他的父親Samuel Cutter46歲，母親Elizabeth Wilkerson Leatherhead43歲。他於大約1643年與Elizabeth在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可坎布利其結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1638年移民到布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼坎布利其。他去世於1693年6月16日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可坎布利其享年71歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可坎布利其。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard Cutter于1621年8月21日出生在英国諾圖波藍德紐可亞斯特爾 武朋时，他的父亲Samuel Cutter46岁，母亲Elizabeth Wilkerson Leatherhead43岁。他于大约1643年与Elizabeth在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可坎布利其结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1638年移民到布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼坎布利其。他去世于1693年6月16日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可坎布利其享年71岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可坎布利其。

nameMeanings.name: Cutter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name from Middle English cuttere ‘craftsman who cuts things; tailor, barber’ possibly also ‘stonecutter, woodcutter’, from an agent derivative of Old English cyttan ‘to cut’.

variants.name: Kotter
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Dietmar, Kurt.
habitational name for someone from any of several places in Germany named Kotten.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

historicEvents.title: Glorious Revolution
historicEvents.description: The Glorious Revolution brought the downfall of Catholic King James II and the reign of his Protestant daughter Mary and her Dutch husband, William III of Orange.

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Cutter was born on 21 August 1621, in Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, England, his father, Samuel Cutter, was 46 and his mother, Elizabeth Wilkerson Leatherhead, was 43. He married Elizabeth about 1643, in Cambridge, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. He immigrated to Cambridge, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America in 1638. He died on 16 June 1693, in Cambridge, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 71, and was buried in Cambridge, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard Cutter est né le 21 août 1621, à Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Angleterre, son père, Samuel Cutter, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Wilkerson Leatherhead, avait 43 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth environ 1643, à Cambridge, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Il a immigré au Cambridge, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique en 1638. Il est décédé le 16 juin 1693, à Cambridge, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 71 ans, et a été enterré à Cambridge, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard Cutter am 21. August 1621 in Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Samuel Cutter 46 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Wilkerson Leatherhead 43. Er hat um 1643 in Cambridge, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America Elizabeth geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er ist 1638 nach Cambridge, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America eingewandert. Er starb am 16. Juni 1693 im Alter von 71 Jahren in Cambridge, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Cambridge, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Cutter è nato il il 21 agosto 1621 nel Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, England, il suo padre, Samuel Cutter, aveva 46 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Wilkerson Leatherhead, aveva 43 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth circa 1643, nel Cambridge, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Immigrato nel Cambridge, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America nel 1638. Morì il 16 giugno 1693, nel Cambridge, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 71 anni, e fu sepolto a Cambridge, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard Cutterが1621年8月21日にイギリスノースウンバーランドニューカストル ウプオン トインで生まれた時，父Samuel Cutterは46歳，母Elizabeth Wilkerson Leatherheadは43歳であった。約1643年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスカンブリッジでElizabethと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1638年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーカンブリッジに移住した。彼は1693年6月16日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスカンブリッジで71歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスカンブリッジにて埋葬された。

ko.Cambridge, Massachusetts Bay, British Co: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 캄브리지
ko.Cambridge, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 캄브리지

ko.Old Burying Ground, Cambridge, Middlesex: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 캄브리지
ko.lifeSummary: Richard Cutter(이)가 1621년 8월 21일 영국 노르스벌랜드 뉴카스틀 업 타이니에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Samuel Cutter(은)는 46세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Wilkerson Leatherhead(은)는 43세였다. 그는 대략 1643년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 캄브리지에서 Elizabeth(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1638년에 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 캄브리지로 이민을 떠났다. 그는 1693년 6월 16일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 캄브리지에서 71세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 캄브리지에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Cutter nasceu em 21 de agosto de 1621, em Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Samuel Cutter, tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Wilkerson Leatherhead, tinha 43 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth aproximadamente 1643, em Cambridge, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele imigrou para o Cambridge, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America em 1638. Ele faleceu em 16 de junho de 1693, em Cambridge, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 71 anos, e foi sepultado em Cambridge, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Cutter родился 21 августа 1621 г. в местности нюкастл упон тин, нортумбирланд, Англия, его отцу по имени Samuel Cutter было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Wilkerson Leatherhead, 43. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth около 1643 г. в местности камбридж, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он иммигрировал в камбридж, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в 1638 году. Он умер 16 июня 1693 г. в местности камбридж, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 71 год и был похоронен в местности камбридж, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

Se casó con Elizabeth aproximadamente 1643, en Cambridge, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Inmigró a Cambridge, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America en 1638. Murió el 16 de junio de 1693, en Cambridge, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 71 años, y fue sepultado en Cambridge, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.
